Industries We Serve

If Equipment Runs Your Business, We'll Get You Dealer-Ready

Yellow iron is our roots. We help equipment buyers across every sector know their buying power.

Construction & Heavy Equipment

Our specialty—excavators, dozers, loaders, and more

Towing & Transport

Wreckers, rotators, rollbacks, recovery vehicles

Auto Body & Automotive

Lifts, paint booths, frame machines, shop equipment

Disposal & Waste

Vacuum trucks, roll-offs, dumpsters, compactors

Manufacturing & Industrial

CNC machines, routers, presses, conveyors

Trucks & Trailers

Dump trucks, flatbeds, reefers, lowboys, day cabs

Forestry & Tree Care

Chippers, stump grinders, bucket trucks, skidders

Gyms & Fitness Studios

Equipment packages, buildouts, studio launches

Multi-Unit Franchises

QSR, fitness, entertainment, health & wellness

And More

If it's business-essential equipment, let's talk

THE WORKFLOW
01

Check Buying Power

Takes about 60 seconds. Tell us what equipment you need and see your estimated buying power upfront — so you can shop with confidence.

02

Match the Machine

We match your specific machine to the most competitive programs in our network — financing built around your equipment and how you operate.

03

Arrive Ready to Work

Confirm a few details and review your options. We coordinate the financing so you can close the deal and put your equipment to work — faster. Options shown are estimates and subject to lender approval.

⚡ No credit impact • No obligation • Just clarity before you buy

Dealer Platform

Why dealers partner with us

3-minute buying power check without a hard credit pull. Buyers know their budget before visiting your lot, reducing back-and-forth and helping your sales team focus on customers who are ready to move forward.
Know instantly when your customer is approved and ready to move. Automatic updates keep your team informed so equipment can be prepared, quoted, and delivered without chasing status updates.
Share branded links and tools directly with your customers. The experience feels like an extension of your dealership, keeping your brand front and center throughout the buying process.
Programs supporting A–C credit profiles, startups, titled and non-titled equipment, and used machines with no age restrictions. More buyers qualify without your team guessing which deals will work.
App-only programs up to $350K, terms up to 84 months, 180-day deferred and annual payment options, no cash down programs, and corporate-only approvals (No PG) — all structured around how the equipment is actually used.
Ask about our Machine-to-Market™ program — tools designed to help dealers create listings, marketing assets, and ready-to-share content that attracts qualified buyers before conversations even begin.
Customers arrive already understanding their buying power and financing options, allowing your team to focus on equipment selection and closing the deal instead of qualifying the customer.

© 2026 Yellow Iron Yard LLC

Soft credit inquiries may be used for prequalification and will not impact your credit score. Financing programs are subject to lender approval and applicant qualifications. Yellow Iron Yard is an equipment finance marketplace and broker that connects businesses with independent financing providers and does not directly lend funds. Terms and conditions apply.
